privileged_info_summary: The task targets https://crawler-test.com/, a real public website designed for SEO and crawler testing that is confirmed to be DNS-resolvable and accessible. The task uses Screaming Frog SEO Spider v23.2 to audit security headers. All three required HTTP security headers (X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Strict-Transport-Security) are verified as standard, legitimate security headers. Export filenames (security_audit.csv) and report filename (security_headers_summary.txt) are correctly specified. The environment explicitly uses REAL websites, not synthetic/local test data. The task duration is 420 seconds with a maximum of 50 steps.
